text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 25 

NC_NVGTN_ACTN_PLAN_CMPLT_SW 

LABEL: Navigation Case Action Plan Complete Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: Navigation case (NC) action plan complete indicator. This field indicates whether a navigator 
developed a personalized action plan for addressing HRSNs with the beneficiary who opted in for 
navigation services. 

LONG NAME: NC_NVGTN_ACTN_PLAN_CMPLT_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1
